items.title: Zo speelde AZ een Armeense stunt in de kaart
items.summary: AZ heeft zich geblameerd in het heenduel van de Conference League-tussenronde. Tegen FC Noah, de nummer vijf uit de Armeense competitie, gaan de Alkmaarders verdiend onderuit: 1-0. Analyse van een duel waar AZ de underdogtactiek van Noah in de kaart speelt.

items.title: Women's FA Cup revamp on hold after 'ridiculous idea' criticism
items.summary: Plans to change the format of the Women's FA Cup, which would have seen four sides seeded and pathways to Wembley mapped out from the last 32 onwards, will not be brought in next season.

items.title: VI Live: AZ raakt opnieuw de paal en stevent af op nederlaag bij FC Noah
items.summary: AZ vervolgt donderdagavond het Europese avontuur. De Alkmaarders staan in de tussenronde van de Conference League tegenover het Armeense FC Noah. Volgende week is de return in Alkmaar. Volg de heenwedstrijd in deze VI Live.

items.title: Bukayo Saka signs new Arsenal contract to 2030
items.summary: Bukayo Saka has signed a new contract to stay at Arsenal, with sources telling ESPN it is a five-year deal.

items.title: Madrid send UEFA evidence in Vini Jr. racism probe
items.summary: Real Madrid say they have supplied "all available evidence" to UEFA as the governing body investigates allegations of racism made by Vinícius Júnior.

items.title: Fabregas 'not proud' of incident with Milan player
items.summary: Como coach Cesc Fabregas has apologised for making contact with an AC Milan player near the touchline in Wednesday's 1-1 league draw at the San Siro.

items.title: Benfica: 'Smear campaign' after Viní allegations
items.summary: Benfica have condemned the "smear campaign" to which their player Gianluca Prestianni has been subjected to following allegations that he racially abused Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior.

items.title: Fenerbahce v Nottingham Forest: Europa League playoff, first leg – live
items.summary: ⚽ Europa League updates from the 5.45pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | You can email Will I was at Dyche’s final game in charge and Omari Hutchinson was underwhelming, to say the least. It will be interesting to see how he reacts to the new regime. Pereira: “Today is three days working. but working to play in a way to try short communications, be very clear. Today I hope that I see my team play organised with tactical organisation, and be able to express themselves, play with courage and a mentality to win.” Continue reading...

items.title: Manchester United v Atlético Madrid: Women’s Champions League playoff – live
items.summary: ⚽ Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | You can email Sarah What is the form of both teams heading into this match? Well Manchester United are looking for their eighth win on the bounce with their latest victory coming against the London City Lionesses in the Women’s Super League on Sunday. Meanwhile, Atlético have only lost one game since their new manager Jose Herrera took over in January which was the first leg against United. Most recently they drew 0-0 with Madrid CFF in Liga F. Manchester United will be wearing their third kit this evening after the club’s other strips were deemed too similar to Atlético’s goalkeeper kit. The Spanish club brought an orange keeper shirt. Continue reading...

items.title: Sutton's predictions v Embrace bassist Steve Firth
items.summary: BBC Sport football expert Chris Sutton takes on Embrace bassist Steve Firth plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Hearn sets out Joshua return plans
items.summary: Anthony Joshua is targeting a return to the ring in July after surviving a fatal car crash in December but will not yet be fighting Tyson Fury next, according to his promoter Eddie Hearn.

items.title: Schaalmodel Johan Cruijff Arena in LEGO-variant komt stap dichterbij
items.summary: Het hart van supporters van Ajax én LEGO-liefhebbers maakt een sprongetje: de bouwsteentjesfabrikant is van plan om de Johan Cruijff Arena in schaalmodel uit te brengen. Het concept gaat de volgende fase in, omdat het idee de magische grens van tienduizend supporters heeft bereikt.

items.title: Heldenrol oud-Ajacied Mikautadze: 'Ontpopt tot de geweldige speler die hij is'
items.summary: Dankzij Georges Mikautadze stelde Villarreal woensdag een overwinning op Levante veilig. Na afloop kreeg de oud-Ajacied complimenten van zijn trainer Marcelino.

items.title: Premier League Darts LIVE! Bunting takes on Van Veen in opening Glasgow clash
Feyenoorder Sterling speelgerechtigd voor duel met Telstar
items.summary: Raheem Sterling heeft zijn werkvergunning binnen. Daardoor is hij op tijd speelgerechtigd voor het duel met Telstar. Feyenoord neemt het zondagavond in competitieverband op tegen de promovendus.

items.title: Controversial Women’s FA Cup plans on hold after pushback from clubs, players and fans
items.summary: No change next season and consultation extended ‘We have listened to the feedback,’ the FA says Proposals to make radical changes to the Women’s FA Cup, including seeding the top four teams from the WSL, have been put on hold, the Guardian can reveal, after the Football Association received negative feedback about the controversial ideas. The FA had also intended to dispense with draw ceremonies after the last 32, introducing a “road to Wembley” bracket akin to a World Cup knockout phase pathway, and review the entry tiers for lower-league sides. But it has put the brakes on its plans after concerns were raised by a significant number of clubs, fan groups and players. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea’s Rosenior calls for life bans from football for those found guilty of racism
items.summary: ‘When you see a player upset, normally it’s for a reason’ Head coach reacts to Vinícius Júnior’s racism claims Liam Rosenior has called for players and coaches found guilty of racism to be banned from football for life and said experiencing abuse on a football pitch “is the worst feeling you can ever possibly imagine”. The Real Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior left the pitch after alleging that Benfica’s Gianluca Prestianni racially abused him during their Champions League match on Tuesday. Prestianni has denied racist abuse and Benfica have said he was a “victim” of a “smear campaign”. The Argentinian faces a 10-game ban if found guilty by Uefa. Continue reading...

items.title: Souttar signs new Rangers deal
items.summary: Defender John Souttar has signed a new deal with Rangers.

items.title: Wood: Warrington rematch could be my last fight
items.summary: Leigh Wood has revealed he could retire after his next fight, a rematch with Josh Warrington.

items.title: The eerie similarities between Arsenal's 2007-8 collapse and now
items.summary: Arsenal's disappointing 2-2 draw at Wolves on Wednesday has similarities to what happened to the Gunners 18 years ago.
